approaches.title: Monotonic decreasing stack
approaches.summary: Process temperatures from left to right while maintaining indices of unresolved days in a decreasing monotonic stack; resolve entries when a warmer temperatureอ

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial monotonic-stack solution that resolves prior cooler temperatures when a warmer day is encountered.

revisions.commitComment: use iterator to reduce bounds checks
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 739: use iterator to reduce bounds checks
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactors iteration to use enumerate and the current temperature value directly, preserving the same monotonic-stack算法.
